feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Tiny Terraces
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Tiny Terraces is an idle-farming game, where you can watch tiny guys do different tasks around the terrace. Grow Crops: Plant crops and watch as the tiny guys manage the garden plots by watering, weeding, and harvesting. Craft Tiny Guys: Use certain crops and tiny guy parts to craft more tiny guys to help manage the terrace. Decorate: Use money produced from crops to buy decorations to detail your terrace.

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：3,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 3,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Children of Morta
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

*O cooperativo on-line já está disponível: compartilhe um código e jogue com um amigo!* Children of Morta é um RPG de ação baseado em história, com uma abordagem roguelite ao desenvolvimento de personagens, no qual você não joga com um único personagem, mas com uma família inteira e extraordinária de heróis. Derrote hordas de inimigos em masmorras, cavernas e terras geradas processualmente e lidere a família Bergson, com todas as suas falhas e virtudes, contra a corrupção que se aproxima. A história se passa em uma terra distante, mas lida com temas e emoções comuns a todos nós: amor e esperança, saudade e incerteza, perda... e o sacrifício que estamos dispostos a fazer para salvar quem mais amamos. No fim, trata-se de uma família de heróis unida contra a escuridão iminente. -- Edição Completa -- Tanto o DLC Ancient Spirits quanto o Paws and Claws estão incluídos no jogo principal e disponíveis conforme você joga. CARACTERÍSTICAS - Boas-vindas à família! Junte-se aos heroicos Bergsons em provações para honrar sua herança e salvar a terra de Rea da crescente corrupção - Um por todos e todos por um! Melhore as habilidades e os equipamentos de toda a família a cada partida no mundo em constante mudança deste RPG roguelite - A união faz a força! Alterne entre 7 personagens jogáveis, cada um com as próprias habilidades, estilos de luta e personalidade cativante - Mergulhe no belo e mortal mundo de Rea feito em pixel art 2D, misturando animações feitas à mão com técnicas modernas de iluminação - Família que mata unida permanece unida: use o modo cooperativo on-line para dois jogadores e confiem um no outro em todas as lutas (disponível em uma atualização pós-lançamento) CUIDADOSAMENTE REPROJETADO PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS - Interface renovada – interface exclusiva para dispositivos móveis com controle sensível ao toque completo - Conquistas do Game Center - Armazenamento na nuvem – compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS - Compatível com controles MFi - Otimizado para iPhone 15 (incluindo Pro Max)

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Skul: The Hero Slayer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

Skul é um roguelite de ação em ritmo acelerado, onde incentiva-se a perder a cabeça. Com 100 personagens jogáveis, cada um com as próprias habilidades exclusivas e muitos itens que podem criar sinergias incríveis, as batalhas são tão eletrizantes quanto desafiadoras. O Castelo do Rei Demônio em ruínas O ataque da raça humana ao castelo do Rei Demônio não é novidade e já aconteceu inúmeras vezes. Desta vez, o que difere é que os aventureiros decidiram unir forças com o Exército Imperial e escolheram o “Herói de Caerleon” para liderar um ataque total na esperança de exterminar os demônios de uma vez por todas. Eles atacaram a fortaleza do Demônio com números esmagadores e conseguiram destruí-lo totalmente. Todos os demônios do castelo viraram prisioneiros, exceto um esqueleto solitário chamado “Skul”. Modo Espelho Sombrio Ao terminar a história principal, teste suas habilidades e seus limites no novo e desafiador modo “Espelho Sombrio”! CARACTERÍSTICAS - Você é a última esperança de toda a raça demoníaca! Jogue como Skul, um esqueletinho no caminho para matar os heróis pomposos e salvar o rei demônio do exército corrupto de Caerleon. - Perder a cabeça nunca foi tão certo: experimente crânios novos para pegar emprestado os poderes e as roupas elegantes dos donos anteriores e crie sinergias com itens exclusivos para derrotar os inimigos. - O que está morto não pode morrer: você não descansará até enfrentar todos os desafios deste jogo de plataforma roguelite cheio de ação. - Deixe seus olhos vazios deleitarem-se com animações 2D vibrantes de pixel art enquanto você ajuda todos os tipos de criaturas demoníacas a retornar ao estado original. - Das múmias do Egito ao Minotauro da Grécia, ou até mesmo um crossover oficial de Dead Cells… Será que você consegue encontrar todos os easter eggs divertidos espalhados pelo jogo? CUIDADOSAMENTE REPROJETADO PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS - Interface renovada – IU exclusiva para dispositivos móveis com controle de toque completo - Conquistas do Game Center - Armazenamento na nuvem – Compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS - Compatível com controles MFi - Otimização do iPhone 15 (incluindo Pro Max)

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Earthquake Network
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Priority 10k for 1 year：10,49 € → 9,99 € [9,99 € ~ 10,49 €]

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Priority 10k for 1 year：9,99 €
  • Priority 10k for 1 month：0,99 €
  • Priority 10k for lifetime：19,99 €
  • Priority 100k for 1 year：6,99 €
  • PRO version：3,49 €
  • Priority 100k for lifetime：14,99 €
  • Priority 100k for 1 month：0,49 €
  • PRO version discounted：2,99 €

Application Description

Earthquake Network is the most comprehensive app on earthquakes and for most world countries it is the only earthquake early warning system for receiving real time alerts. Earthquake Network gives you: - Real time alerts if you live close to the epicentre - Alerts seconds in advances if you live far from the epicentre - Real time user reports on felt earthquakes - Free earthquake data from 21 seismic networks including U.S., Puerto Rico, India, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, Argentina, Venezuela, Dominican Republic, Colombia, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, China, New Zeland, Japan, Italy, Croatia, Spain and Greece The Earthquake Network research project (https://www.sismo.app) aims at developing a smartphone-based earthquake early warning system able to detect earthquakes in real time and to alert the population in advance. Smartphones are able to detect earthquakes thanks to the accelerometer on-board each device. When an earthquake is detected, users with the application installed are immediatly alerted. Since earthquake waves travel at around 5 km/s it is possible to alert the population not yet reached by the damaging waves of the earthquake. For the scientific details about the project please refer to the scientific paper on Frontiers at https://bit.ly/2C8B5HI Subscriptions: When an earthquake is detected in real time by smartphones near the epicenter, the server sends an alert to all users with the app. Alerting all users can take up to 10 seconds since it is not technically feasible to do so instantly. Now you can join the priority lists of the first 10,000 or 100,000 people alerted in real time. The following subscriptions are available: - Subscription 10k for 1 year - Subscription 10k for 1 month - Subscription 100k for 1 year - Subscription 100k for 1 month • Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase • Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period • Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal • Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase • Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable Privacy: https://www.sismo.app/privacy Terms and conditions: https://www.sismo.app/terms-conditions

entry.title: 不玩手机-自律习惯养成记
entry.id: 不玩手机-自律习惯养成记-pt-1783308623317
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • 不玩手机永久会员：22,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 22,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 不玩手机年自动订阅：9,99 €
  • 周订阅：0,49 €
  • 不玩手机永久会员：3,99 €

Application Description

这个App可以让你更专注地工作或学习，戒掉手机瘾，让你在工作或学习的时候远离手机，提高工作和学习的效率。 当开启了不玩手机警报后，你在设定的时间里拿起手机将会报警，这将培养你更专注于学习或工作的习惯。 App使用方法： 1. 选择要集中精力工作的时间间隔。 2. 把手机放在水平桌面上。 3. 点击开始按钮。 4. 直接按下锁定屏幕按钮。 5. 开始并专注于你的工作或学习。 快来和我们一起进步吧！！！ 1. 该服务是订阅制的收费服务，这意味着您将为未来的订阅使用而提前预支费用。当前您可以选择以按季度的方式来使用该服务。在每个订阅周期即将结束时，您的订阅默认将自动续费，除非您自行取消自动续费，或者由我们取消该服务。 2. 取消订阅:如需取消续订，请至少提前24小时操作取消。您可以通过如下方法取消：打开系统设置 - 点击Apple ID - 点击订阅 - 选择高级版，取消订阅即可。 3. 恢复购买:如果在支付过程中，收到提示 “您目前已经订阅该项目”，并且确定之前完成了购买，可以点击右上角 “恢复购买” 进行购买恢复。 会员服务协议及自动续费协议： https://gcn1s2rmayw3.feishu.cn/wiki/YgqKwPdJmiH0ulkF92kco1CznCg?from=from_copylink 隐私政策： https://gcn1s2rmayw3.feishu.cn/wiki/SGBIwmUWCiPWoWktE5sclLRgnol?from=from_copylink

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Birthday, anniversaries, moving, First day of ... How to remember them all? DDay, simply marked down the day Celebrate each in full color.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Cross Stitch Saga
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：17,99 € → 17,00 € [17,00 € ~ 17,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：17,00 €

Application Description

Cross Stitch Saga with interactive cross-stitch patterns is a mobile assistant for modern embroiderers. It is designed for easy reading and marking of patterns, to speed up the embroidery process. The application produces an interactive cross-stitch pattern from source files: • XSD — Pattern Maker v. 4 • XSP — XSPro Platinum • PAT — PC Stitch v. 6-10 • OXS — MacStitch • DIZE — CSP PDF Converter • CSS — CSSaga Chart Encrypter • The interactive pattern format SAGA is being distributed by embroidery pattern designers and embroidery kit manufacturers. The application opens up patterns of various sizes and complexity, which use: cross, half-cross, quarter-cross, petit, oblong, backstitch, longstitch, french knot, decorative stitches, beads. The application is suitable for various cross-stitching methods: "by colors", for all types of "parking", for complex patterns with backstitch, etc. To help the cross-stitcher: multi-isolation, link strands, mark mask, restricting areas, as well as jump automation between colors after marking. The application keeps a detailed calendar of cross-stitching, sprints timing and marking and goals for your pattern marks. The application works in landscape and portrait orientation, supports Split View mode, dark and light interface themes. The application has a user-friendly ergonomic interface with the ability to customize the location of toolbars and the visibility of buttons. To call up additional settings for any tool, long press its icon. • Use the built-in calculator to estimate fabric, floss, and beads • Mark what is already stitched (color up or erase) in a convenient way • Instantly navigate through the pattern, use gestures, scale without loss of quality • Control the visibility of stitches on a pattern: highlight, isolate the necessary elements of the pattern, turn off the layers according to their types • Instantly get all the information about each pattern element (type, color, number of threads, blended floss content) • Sort the floss in the pattern legend list, use the search by numbers • Customize the appearance of the pattern — set any color of the symbols, stitch fill, grids, background, measurement rulers and guides, borders and background of the restricting cross-stitch area. Rotate or mirror the pattern • Participate in cross-stitch competitions and marathons • Save the progress of the pattern marks to the Cloud or to Files for storage or subsequent transfer of the stitching process to your other devices, share patterns via AirDrop Interactive cross-stitch pattern — all control at your fingertips! *The cross-stitch pattern on the screenshots illustrating the functionality of the application is not distributed with the application The application is not intended for working with illustrations and documents.

entry.title: Happy Game :)
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Um garotinho adormece com um pesadelo terrível. Você consegue fazer com que ele volte a ficar feliz? - Nova aventura de horror psicodélico - Enfrente e escape de três pesadelos inesquecíveis - Resolva enigmas profundamente inquietantes em locais (des) encantadores - Lide com coelhinhos rosas e carinhas sorridentes suspeitas - Berros e músicas assustadoras de DVA, uma banda tcheca de freakfolk

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Machinarium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Machinarium é o premiado jogo de aventura independente desenvolvido pelos criadores de Samorost, Botanicula e CHUCHEL. Ajude o robô Josef a salvar sua namorada Berta, sequestrada pela gangue Blackcap Brotherhood. Absolutamente fantástico - TouchArcade 4/4 - USA TODAY 4/4 - SlideToPlay 9/10 - Pocket Gamer Prêmios: - IGF, Excellence in Visual Art Award - Gamasutra, Best Indie Game Of The Year - VGChartz.com, Best Indie Game Of The Year

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
